name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Invoice Ninja: use room name as product key directly; removed IN product mapping fields from room settings.

sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2: Removed Invoice Ninja product mapping fields from room settings — product lookup now uses room name directly as the product key (e.g. '04 - Tournesol'). Simplifies setup.
  • 1.9.1: Invoice Ninja product linking: send product_id alongside product_key so line items link to real IN products. Fixes duplicate hash products being created.
